tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All laboratory values are within normal limits except for a low HbA1c (3.3%), which may suggest recent hypoglycemia, anemia, or altered red cell turnover. Glucose is normal. Renal function and electrolytes are unremarkable. Correlate clinically for possible causes of low HbA1c; consider retesting if clinically indicated.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: Azienda Sanitaria Locale n° 7 Musei
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
